group.value: Group C — opponents Brazil, Haiti, Scotland

wc_2022.value: First African and first Arab nation to reach a World Cup semifinal (2022), beating Belgium, Spain and Portugal en route

wc_role.value: 2022 semifinalists and Africa's standard-bearer; dark-horse contenders captained by Achraf Hakimi

wc2026_match1.value: Opened WC2026 with a 1-1 draw vs Brazil (13 Jun, MetLife). Ismael Saibari put Morocco ahead in the 21st (chipped Alisson off a Brahim Diaz through ball); Vinicius Junior equalized in the 32nd. Keeper Bounou made crucial late saves; ~10 min stoppage time. Morocco held five-time champions Brazil — a statement point for the Atlas Lions.
